productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Hydro Sail Black Grey Blue Shoe
description: These Hydro Sail shoes from rockport are a fresh take on the classic boating shoes. Made with environment friendly AgION technology which stops odour and provides long lasting protection takes nautical wear to the next level. Team this with denims and striped tees for a yatching inspired look.UpperSmooth leather, mesh and coated mesh upper for maximum breathabilityRubber overlays to further add to the midfoot structure and maximum styleSporty colour pops for an urban appealFully cushioned collar and tongue for snug FitTraditional lace-up shoelaces that are specially designed to stay tiedFabric lining offers breathability and comfort for a healthy, happy foot environmentHolder loop made of durable rubber on the collar to hang air dryMidsoleadidas adiPRENE footbed with heel cup offers highly shock-absorbent cushioning to protect the heel at impactSuperior Hydro motion water drainage and dispersal system in the footbed and the soleFootbed that incorporates silicon bubbles to ensure that the shoe will stay on the foot, regardless of environmental conditionsPU midsole offers durability for long-term wear and shock-absorbent cushioning to help reduce foot fatigueOutsoleRubber outsole delivers grip on wet and dry surfaces to guarantee sure footingStrobel construction offers forefoot flexibility to aid the walking motionMulti directional flex grooves offering maximum flexibility of the feetRounded sole edges to allow for balance while the boat rocks back and forthWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
